wine_hotels.name: Hotel Schloss Reinhartshausen, Vignette Collection
wine_hotels.category: 5-star castle hotel, Vignette Collection by IHG
wine_hotels.description: Historic Rheingau castle hotel reopening as part of IHG's Vignette Collection in January 2026. Fifty-three rooms and suites, three restaurants and a wellness area on the riverbank in Erbach.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Marcobrunn gourmet restaurant; estate wine programme from Schloss Reinhartshausen, the 680-year-old castle winery

wine_hotels.name: Relais and Chateaux Hotel Burg Schwarzenstein
wine_hotels.description: Castle hotel above the Rheingau vineyards in Geisenheim-Johannisberg, with rooms split between the historic castle, Park Residence and Guest House. Vineyard views over the Rhine valley and Burgrestaurant Schwarzenstein.
wine_hotels.wine_program: On-site Burgrestaurant Schwarzenstein and Brasserie Schwarzenstein; vineyard-view dining with Rheingau wine list

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Kronenschloesschen
wine_hotels.description: Family-run 4-star hotel and gourmet restaurant in central Hattenheim, with a painted-ceiling dining room and head sommelier Florian Richter (Sommelier des Jahres 2023).
wine_hotels.wine_program: Award-winning wine list led by sommelier Florian Richter; cellar selections across Rheingau, France and beyond

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Kloster Eberbach
wine_hotels.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_hotels.description: Hotel in the historic 1136 Cistercian abbey of Kloster Eberbach in the Rheingau hinterland above Eltville. Double, superior and deluxe rooms inside and beside the monastery, with the Vinothek WineBar1136 and Klosterschaenke alongside.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Vinothek and WineBar1136 onsite; Klosterschaenke restaurant pouring the Hessische Staatsweinguter range

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Schwan
wine_hotels.description: Riverside half-timbered hotel built in 1628 and owned by the Wenckstern family ever since. Hotel and Gasthaus Ilse share the Rhine view between them, with a cavernous wine cellar where the family wines are served.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Wenckstern family wines served in the historic vaulted wine cellar; Rheingau list in the restaurant

wine_hotels.name: Weinhaus Zum Krug Hotel
wine_hotels.description: Hotel and wine house in a 1720 half-timbered building in central Hattenheim, run by the Laufer family for three generations. Eight comfort rooms and renovated deluxe rooms with vineyard-themed names alongside a 350-bottle wine list.
wine_hotels.wine_program: 350-bottle Rheingau-led wine list in the restaurant and Vinothek, with a broad selection of Rheingau estates under one roof

wine_hotels.name: Gaestezimmer der Adler Wirtschaft
wine_hotels.description: Five double rooms attached to the Adler Wirtschaft of chef Franz Keller in central Hattenheim. Modern French bistro programme using meat from the family Falkenhof farm and Rheingau wines from neighbouring estates.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Rheingau wine programme alongside the Adler Wirtschaft restaurant; close to Hattenheim VDP estates

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Ruedesheimer Hof
wine_hotels.address: Geisenheimer Strasse 1, 65385 Ruedesheim am Rhein, Germany
wine_hotels.description: Family-run hotel in central Ruedesheim, run by the fifth generation across the street from Weingut Georg Breuer. Forty-two rooms with 70 beds, breakfast and walking access to the Drosselgasse and the Rhine promenade.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Walking distance to Weingut Georg Breuer Vinothek opposite; close to the WINEAROUND tasting walk

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Lindenwirt
wine_hotels.description: Hotel and wine tavern on the Drosselgasse opened 1927 and run by the third generation of the Ohlig family. Sixty rooms around a courtyard, plus the Weinfass option to spend the night inside a giant wine barrel.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Wine tavern with Rheingau Riesling and Spatburgunder; Drosselgasse vinothek access alongside

wine_hotels.name: Weinhaus Sinz Hotel
wine_hotels.description: Hotel attached to the Weinhaus Sinz restaurant in Wiesbaden-Frauenstein, in the middle of the city's vineyards. Seventeen rooms across the main building and three guest houses, with regional Rheingau wines in the dining room.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Rheingau wine list in the restaurant; estate visits from the Wiesbaden vineyards nearby

wine_hotels.name: Balthasar Ress Suite Hattenheim
wine_hotels.description: Estate suite at Weingut Balthasar Ress on the Hattenheim riverfront, in the former bishop's residence beside the vinothek. Estate Rieslings and Pinot tastings on site at the working VDP winery.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate VDP Rheingau range on tap at the vinothek; in-house tastings and guided cellar visits

wine_hotels.name: Balthasar Ress Guesthouse Hallgarten
wine_hotels.category: Estate guesthouse on the vineyard slope
wine_hotels.description: Guesthouse of Weingut Balthasar Ress on the vineyard slope above Hallgarten, run from the Hattenheim estate. Vineyard-view rooms with breakfast and access to the Hallgartener Jungfer parcel that the estate works.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Hattenheim and Hallgarten Rieslings on the breakfast list; tasting visits to the main winery in Hattenheim
